mapper.select: select a.id,a.code,b.parent_code,a.value,b.is_plus,b.is_tax,b.name,b.is_fixed,b.is_compute from hrm_salary_month_option_value a inner join hrm_salary_option b on a.code = b.code where a.s_emp_record_id = #{sEmpRecordId}

select a.id,a.code,b.parent_code,a.value,b.is_plus,b.is_tax,b.name,b.is_fixed,b.is_compute from hrm_salary_month_option_value a inner join hrm_salary_option b on a.code = b.code where a.s_emp_record_id = #{sEmpRecordId}
